Sankhydyogas These are Numerical yogas based on the
number of Rasts (not Bhavas) occupied by the 7 planets. You
may in this connection remember that some of these Numerical
Yogas coincide with some of the Akrtiyogas. In such cases
you have to designate the yogas by their Akrtiyoga names only.
The Sankhyayogas are seven in number. They ae (1) Vallakt
or Vina when all the 7 planets are separately situated in 7 Signs
(not Bhavas), (2) Ddminl when they arc posited in 6 RaSis, (3)
Pdsa when they are in 5 Rasis, (4) Keddra when they are in
4 Rasis, (5) £u!a when they are in 3 Ra&s, (6) Yuga when they
are only in two Signs, and (7) Golaka when all the planets are
crowded in a single Sign. Now 1 shall give the effects of these
in order. Effects of Vallaki or Vina : The person concerned
will have many friends, will speak sweetly, be well versed in the
scriptures and instrumental music, happy, and will have many
servants.
